title: Gallstones in Obese People: 8 Herbal Teas for Natural Relief
description: Agrimonia eupatoria teas have been traditionally used to help alleviate symptoms of gallstones. The tea's active compounds, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, may help reduce inflammation and relax the muscles in the gallbladder, making it easier to pass stones. The tea also contains antioxidants, which can help protect the body from oxidative stress caused by gallstone formation.
